final_answer:
“Mock” means a fake test implementation of `GiltConsensus` that returns controlled data, instead of calling a real live `GiltConsensus` service.

Why it matters: it keeps tests deterministic and fast while production runtime still requires real `GiltConsensus` and no bypass flags.

What should be done next: keep mocks only in test code, and keep production startup/config paths pointed only to real `GiltConsensus` endpoints.
